creator: m.serdienis@gmail.com
text:
vSphere version in both cases are  6.0

All was working on such system:
FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p7
open-vm-tools version 9.4.0.25793 (build-1280544)

Not working on such system:
FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p1 (tried also 11.0 that you can download from freebsd website)
open-vm-tools version 10.1.10.63510 (build-6082533)

Installation of vmtools is done using command:
pkg install open-vm-tools-nox11

-----------------

Regarding errors in log file. The errors with C locale are such:
[Oct 10 10:47:36.287] [ message] [vmtoolsd] Tools Version: 10.1.10.63510 (build-6082533)
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmsvc] Cannot load message catalog for domain 'hgfsServer', language 'C', catalog dir '/usr/local/share/open-vm-tools'.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmtoolsd] Plugin 'hgfsServer' initialized.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmsvc] Cannot load message catalog for domain 'vix', language 'C', catalog dir '/usr/local/share/open-vm-tools'.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmtoolsd] Plugin 'vix' initialized.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmsvc] Cannot load message catalog for domain 'deployPkg', language 'C', catalog dir '/usr/local/share/open-vm-tools'.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmtoolsd] Plugin 'deployPkg' initialized.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmsvc] Cannot load message catalog for domain 'guestInfo', language 'C', catalog dir '/usr/local/share/open-vm-tools'.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmtoolsd] Plugin 'guestInfo' initialized.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmsvc] Cannot load message catalog for domain 'powerops', language 'C', catalog dir '/usr/local/share/open-vm-tools'.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmtoolsd] Plugin 'powerops' initialized.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmsvc] Cannot load message catalog for domain 'timeSync', language 'C', catalog dir '/usr/local/share/open-vm-tools'.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmtoolsd] Plugin 'timeSync' initialized.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmsvc] Cannot load message catalog for domain 'vmbackup', language 'C', catalog dir '/usr/local/share/open-vm-tools'.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.289] [ message] [vmtoolsd] Plugin 'vmbackup' initialized.
[Oct 10 10:47:36.325] [ message] [vix] VixTools_ProcessVixCommand: command 62


Besides the error in log file, when the locale is set to C I am not able to upload customization file to VM using openvmtools... when I set the locale to en_US.UTF-8, then the upload function works successfully.

The steps what are done using open-vm-tools to customize deployed VM:
1. Create new directory "/upload" (Step completed successfully)
2. Upload "test.sh" file to created directory (Step completes successfully if vmware-guestd uses en_US.UTF-8 locale, fails if locale is C)
3. Execute file. (Step fails, in VM console I can see error "[   error] [vmsvc] Unable to execute the ""/upload/test.sh"" shell command: Bad address")

Linux distros like Ubuntu works OK with open-vm-tools version 10.X.
